settings.feedback_legalese:
Feedback / Geri Bildirim:
Feedback submitted through the app (bug reports, suggestions, device info, and optional screenshots) is transmitted securely to Firebase servers and collected solely for debugging purposes, independent of the open-source license. No personally identifiable information is collected. Your privacy rights are protected under GDPR/KVKK.
settings.privacy_text:
**PRIVACY POLICY AND CLARIFICATION TEXT**

This application ("Wake Me at the Stop") processes your data only for the nature of the service, in accordance with the Law on the Protection of Personal Data No. 6698 ("KVKK") and GDPR.

1. What Data is Collected?
* Location Data: Used to calculate how close you are to the alarm stop. This data is strictly NOT sent to our servers; it is processed locally on your phone.
* Background Location: Accessed in the background so the alarm can ring when the app is closed or the screen is locked.
* Analytics Data (Optional): With your consent, crash logs and anonymous usage statistics are collected via Google Firebase Analytics to improve the app. No personally identifiable information is collected.
* Feedback Data: If you submit a bug report or suggestion, your description, optionally attached screenshots, and basic device info (OS version, device model) are collected solely for technical support purposes.

2. Where is Data Stored?
All alarm and settings data is stored locally and encrypted on your device. Feedback data is securely transmitted to our Google Cloud (Firebase) servers with an anonymous identifier (UUID) and is only accessible by the developer.

3. Sharing with Third Parties
Your data is not shared with third parties for advertising purposes. Anonymous statistics are processed by Google Analytics for infrastructure improvement. Queries are sent anonymously to map services (Nominatim/Photon) only for address search operations.

4. Your Rights
You can instantly destroy all your local data by deleting the app, and you can opt-out of analytics data collection at any time from the settings menu.
